Comment: TruClaw escalation workflow. Started synchronously (StartSyncExecution) by interceptor/handler.py on ESCALATE. Express workflow type, since Express Sync executions are capped around 5 minutes -- comfortably above the default 120s CHALLENGE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS, but re-check this if the timeout is ever increased materially, or move to a Standard workflow + fully-async 'pending, caller retries' pattern instead (see interceptor/handler.py docstring).
